title: Fix booking form error message display

requirements.summary: Investigate and fix error message display in booking form to show proper success/error feedback in both Hindi and English
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the booking form does not show a spurious or unhandled error message on a successful booking
If a real error occurs (backend rejection, validation failure), a descriptive error message is displayed to the user in the current language (Hindi/English)
On successful booking submission, a success confirmation message is shown and no error message is visible
The BookingForm component handles Promise rejections and actor call failures gracefully without crashing
Error and success messages use the existing bilingual translations from translations.ts

file_operations.description: Refactor the booking submission handler to properly distinguish between success and error responses from the backend createBooking function. Add state management for success/error messages. Implement proper error handling for Promise rejections, actor call failures, and network issues. Display success confirmation using translations when the backend returns #ok, and show descriptive error messages using translations when the backend returns #err or when network/actor errors occur. Clear any previous error/success state before each submission. Ensure the component uses the useLanguage hook to render messages in the active language (Hindi/English).

requirements.summary: Add bilingual translation strings for booking error and success states in translations.ts
acceptanceCriteria: translations.ts contains keys for bookingSuccess, bookingError, and bookingNetworkError in both Hindi and English
BookingForm renders these translated strings dynamically based on the active language context

file_operations.description: Add translation keys for booking feedback messages: bookingSuccess (booking confirmation message), bookingError (generic submission/validation error), and bookingNetworkError (network or backend unavailable error). Provide both Hindi and English versions for each key. Ensure the keys are added to the existing translation structure and follow the existing bilingual pattern used throughout the file.
